findings.message: plugin.json repository URL (git@code.alipay.com:wuwenbang.wwb/pony.git) differs from package.json repository URL (git@github.com:leowux/pony.git); inconsistent canonical source reference
Agent has no concrete invocation example block; Output_Format section shows a template but not an actual input→output demonstration
Tool_Usage lists TaskCreate, TaskUpdate, TaskList as callable tools but these are not declared in plugin.json and do not match standard Claude Code built-in tool names; will silently fail at runtime
Agent has no concrete invocation example block; Output_Format section is a template only
Vague quantifier 'relevant' used in Success Criteria: 'ALL relevant matches found (not just the first one)' — 'relevant' is undefined and leaves scope ambiguous
Agent has no concrete invocation example block; Output_Format shows a template but not an actual planning session
Agent has no concrete invocation example block; Output_Format is a template only
Command declares no allowed-tools; Bash is required to invoke pony hud/hud-config CLI commands
No output format specified for Claude's response after executing HUD management commands
Command declares no allowed-tools; Bash is required to run 'pony init'
No output format specified for Claude's response after initializing Pony
Command instructs Claude to call Agent() but 'Agent' is not listed in allowed-tools frontmatter; runtime enforcement will block the default planner→executor→verifier pipeline
Command declares no allowed-tools despite explicitly using Agent tool in the Implementation section
No output format specified for Claude's response at the end of the orchestration loop

Vague quantifier 'appropriate' in Workflow step 5: 'Use Agent tool with appropriate subagent_type' — the routing table already specifies the exact subagent_type, making 'appropriate' redundant and vague
Command declares no allowed-tools; Bash is required to invoke pony CLI subcommands
No output format specified for Claude's response after task operations
Argument-hint requires a subcommand (<add|list|get|update|delete|next>) but the command body does not specify what Claude should do when invoked with no arguments
vite-plus is pinned to 'latest' which resolves to whatever the package author publishes next; any future version installs automatically
Production dependencies chalk ^5.3.0, commander ^12.0.0, zod ^3.22.0 use ^ ranges; minor/patch updates install automatically on fresh installs without lockfile
publishConfig.registry points to internal Alipay registry (registry.antgroup-inc.cn); external consumers cannot install the package from standard npm and have no visibility into published versions
Command instructs Claude to call Agent() but 'Agent' is not listed in allowed-tools frontmatter; runtime enforcement will block the default planner→executor→verifier pipeline
Agent has no concrete invocation example block; Output_Format section shows a template but not an actual input→output demonstration
Agent has no concrete invocation example block; Output_Format section is a template only
Vague quantifier 'relevant' used in Success Criteria: 'ALL relevant matches found (not just the first one)' — 'relevant' is undefined and leaves scope ambiguous
Agent has no concrete invocation example block; Output_Format shows a template but not an actual planning session
Agent has no concrete invocation example block; Output_Format is a template only

No output format specified for Claude's response at the end of the orchestration loop

No output format specified for Claude's response after task operations

vite-plus is pinned to 'latest' which resolves to whatever the package author publishes next; any future version installs automatically
Production dependencies chalk ^5.3.0, commander ^12.0.0, zod ^3.22.0 use ^ ranges; minor/patch updates install automatically on fresh installs without lockfile
publishConfig.registry points to internal Alipay registry (registry.antgroup-inc.cn); external consumers cannot install the package from standard npm and have no visibility into published versions
